name: Agent Economy Data
description: Structured datasets comparing agent systems against the rstack four-part agent definition. For developers and agents evaluating agent infrastructure.

skills.name: Query agent systems dataset
skills.description: Filter the agent systems dataset by qualification status, scheduling type, cost model, provider support, and other dimensions.

skills.name: Download full dataset
skills.description: Download the complete agent systems comparison dataset as JSON or CSV.

skills.name: Inspect schema and sample rows
skills.description: Retrieve the free dataset schema and sample rows to evaluate before purchasing.

skills.name: Get qualification evidence
skills.description: Retrieve per-system pass/fail scores with source citations for each of the four rstack agent criteria.
